meta.stack: Tauri v2 + React 19 + TypeScript + Vite 7; Python (Cellpose) sidecar via uv; SQLite in Rust backend
meta.v1Scope: Cellpose cyto3 only; Windows-first; UI kept backend-agnostic for a later WebGPU/onnxruntime-web build

conventions.coordinateSpace: All cell/annotation geometry is in SOURCE-PIXEL space; Viewport supplies viewScale/viewOffset.
conventions.ipc: UI ⇄ Rust via @tauri-apps/api invoke() + event listen(); Rust ⇄ Python via argv + stdout(JSON) + stderr(progress).
conventions.freezeBeforeParallel: All phase:kernel interface files must be frozen before any phase:feature task begins (see ARCHITECTURE.md §6).

meta.futureSeam: train-from-GUI is intentionally NOT a task. The model_versions table (kernel-persistence) and the append-only corrections log + lossless _seg.npy round-trip (seg-npy-io) are the extension points; do not architect them out.

tasks.title: Shared TypeScript domain types
tasks.objective: Define the canonical DTO vocabulary (Image, Detection, Cell, Calibration, SizeBin, CompareGroup/Result, GroundTruth, F1Score, Batch, EditorMode, OverlayMode) that every page, port, and kernel module imports.
tasks.output: types.ts exports all interfaces in ARCHITECTURE.md §3.2 with exact field names/types; compiles with strict TS; no runtime code.
tasks.boundaries: No React, no I/O, no Tauri. Pure type declarations only. Do not add persistence or transport logic here.

tasks.title: Inference transport interface + Rust↔Python IPC + sidecar manager
tasks.objective: Freeze the InferenceTransport TS interface and the Rust command surface (run_detection/cancel_detection/detection_availability), and implement SidecarManager that spawns cellpose_detect.py with the exact Swift argv, drains stdout JSON, streams stderr progress, and cancels via SIGTERM→SIGKILL.
tasks.output: detect() resolves to DetectionResultDTO or rejects with a typed DetectionError; progress events {stage,device,weights} delivered per runId; argv order + snake↔camel mapping match Detection/CellposeDetectionService.swift and SidecarSchema.swift; cancel kills the process; orphan sweep on launch.
tasks.boundaries: Do NOT bootstrap the Python env (that is kernel-env / models page) and do NOT write to the DB. Only the transport contract + process lifecycle. Keep TauriSidecarTransport free of any onnxruntime references (browser impl is a separate future file).

tasks.title: SQLite schema + PersistencePort + Rust repo
tasks.objective: Create the 10-table SQLite schema (1:1 with the SwiftData records), the PersistencePort TS interface, and the Rust repo behind #[command]s, plus paths.rs (app-data dir tree) and import_image (decode + whole-file SHA-256 + thumbnail + EXIF probe).
tasks.output: All PersistencePort methods in ARCHITECTURE.md §3.8 implemented against store.sqlite; DDL matches §3.8 (cascade rules, unique detection-per-image, hash index); CellPayload JSON round-trips CellDTO incl. flattened contour; import_image returns {image, calibration}; schema readable from the existing macOS store.sqlite.
tasks.boundaries: No UI. No detection/sidecar logic. Do not embed export formatting here (that is the export task). Keep model_versions table created but unused.

tasks.title: uv Python-environment bootstrap
tasks.objective: Replace install_python.sh/_lib_install.sh with a uv-based bootstrap: create the venv under the app-data python/ dir, sync the cyto3 dependency set, resolve the sidecar interpreter path, and stream install progress; expose availability + install as Rust commands.
tasks.output: Commands: env_install (streams uv output lines as events), env_availability(modelId) -> {installed, reason}; pyproject.toml pins cellpose>=3,<4, numpy<2, pillow, scikit-image, torch, torchvision; interpreter path resolved for the sidecar; incomplete-install sentinel handled like CellposeAvailability.swift.
tasks.boundaries: Do not spawn detection (kernel-transport owns that). Do not copy scripts other than resolving the desktop/python dir. No UI — the Models page consumes these commands.

tasks.title: Global state store (zustand)
tasks.objective: Port AppState to a zustand store with AnalysisParams/Session/Library/Processing/Error slices, localStorage persistence for analysis params, refreshLibraryStats, and effectiveConfidence.
tasks.output: AppStore exposes every slice field + setters in ARCHITECTURE.md §3.3 with the Swift defaults (thresholds [20,30], pxPerUm 2.6, confidence 0.50, activeModelId cp-cyto3, maxParallel 1, useGpu true); refreshLibraryStats() reads counts via PersistencePort; effectiveConfidence(store,image) honours per-image override.
tasks.boundaries: No components. Store is headless. Do not call the transport directly from the store beyond wiring processing state; pages orchestrate detection.

tasks.title: Viewport (pan/zoom/render) + transform context
tasks.objective: Build the canvas Viewport component that renders the source image with pan/zoom and provides a ViewportTransform context (source-px ⇄ view-px) so overlay/edit children share one coordinate system.
tasks.output: ViewportProps per ARCHITECTURE.md §3.4 (min/max zoom 0.4/4.0, fit-to-view, controlled zoom/pan); exposes ViewportTransformContext with sourceToView/viewToSource; children render in source-px.
tasks.boundaries: Rendering + gestures only. No cell drawing (that is kernel-overlay-engine), no editing, no persistence.

tasks.title: Mask-overlay renderer + mask-editing engine
tasks.objective: Implement the read-only MaskOverlay renderer (contours/bbox/markers/annotations, opacity, uncertain-dashed) and the pure MaskEditEngine state machine (add/addFromContour/remove/merge/split/resize, hit-testing, 50-deep undo/redo, onCommit).
tasks.output: MaskOverlayProps + MaskEditEngine public API per ARCHITECTURE.md §3.5; EditEvent union incl. split; merge geometry d=√(da²+db²)/√2; undo/redo capped at 50; engine is framework-free and unit-tested; renderer consumes ViewportTransformContext.
tasks.boundaries: Engine must stay pure (no React/canvas/DB). Do not persist edits here — pages subscribe via onCommit and write corrections. Do not implement _seg.npy here.

tasks.title: Calibration + size-binning module
tasks.objective: Port EXIF priority contract, unit conversion, built-in presets/objective mapping, and size-binning (binsFromThresholds/binIndex/sizeClass) to portable TS.
tasks.output: Functions per ARCHITECTURE.md §3.6: CALIBRATION_PRIORITY order (OME→TIFF→ImageJ→Olympus), unitToUm, BUILTIN_PRESETS (Olympus IX73 ladder), objectiveLabel (±25%), binsFromThresholds ([20,30]→<20/20–30/>30), binIndex, sizeClass; pure, no I/O.
tasks.boundaries: The raw-bytes EXIF probe lives in Rust importer (kernel-persistence); this module owns the contract + binning math only. No React.

tasks.title: Statistics module (Mann-Whitney U + F1), portable
tasks.objective: Direct port of Statistics.swift (Mann-Whitney U with normal approximation + continuity correction + rank-biserial) and AnnotationMatcher.swift (greedy nearest-neighbour F1), as pure TS with the Swift self-test cases as unit tests.
tasks.output: mannWhitneyU (null when n<3), median, normalCdf, twoTailedNormalP, evaluateF1 (radius = matchRadiusFactor*max(diameterPx,1), default 1.0) returning F1Score; matches Swift numeric results in tests; runs identically in browser.
tasks.boundaries: Pure functions only. No React, no plotting, no DOM. Do not read the store or ports.

tasks.title: Home page + import/detect drop flow
tasks.objective: Build the Home screen: drop target + Choose-images/folder CTAs + recents; orchestrate import (dedup check) then per-image detection, driving processing state and routing to Results.
tasks.output: Dropping/choosing images creates a batch, imports via import_image, runs detect() per image with progress into the store, saves detections, navigates to /results; duplicate prompt surfaces when hashes match existing records; recents list renders from PersistencePort.
tasks.boundaries: Own only pages/home/. Do not implement the Processing screen UI (feat-processing), the batch table (feat-batch), or export. Route by store, do not import other pages' internals.

tasks.title: Processing screen (progress + live stderr + cancel)
tasks.objective: Determinate progress view showing overall batch progress, the live cellpose stderr stage line, the resolved device, and a Cancel action.
tasks.output: Reads ProcessingSlice (progress/stageLine/device/lastStageUpdateAt); Cancel calls InferenceTransport.cancel(runId) and returns to the prior view; watchdog treats active stderr as progress.
tasks.boundaries: Own only pages/processing/. Do not run detection yourself (Home/Results dispatch it); only visualize + cancel.

tasks.title: Results page shell + analysis sidebar
tasks.objective: Compose the Results screen: Viewport + MaskOverlay, overlay/opacity toggles, and the right analysis sidebar (count summary, size-bin distribution + histogram, QC badges, colonies, notes, ROI include/exclude, F1-vs-ground-truth). Hosts the editing toolbar and directory nav mount points.
tasks.output: Renders current image with cells; toggles (Space/X/Z) + opacity work; sidebar shows bins (binsFromThresholds), intensity histogram, QC badges (focus/illumination thresholds), colony stats from imageStats, F1 via evaluateF1 when annotations exist, ROI filtering (include→exclude); reads/writes via ports.
tasks.boundaries: Own only pages/results/. The editing gestures live in feat-mask-editing (also under pages/results but in a clearly separated subfolder pages/results/editing/ owned by that task) — coordinate so files don't overlap: this task owns pages/results/ excluding pages/results/editing/. Do not implement export (feat-export) or seg-npy (feat-seg-npy) beyond mounting their entry points.

tasks.title: Manual mask-editing UI (draw/delete/bulk/merge/split + undo/redo)
tasks.objective: Wire the MaskEditEngine to pointer gestures in Results: add-by-click, draw-a-mask (right-drag freeform), delete single, bulk-delete by rectangle, merge, split-by-stroke, resize handles, multi-select (cmd/shift/lasso), and undo/redo; persist each edit as a correction.
tasks.output: All EditorMode interactions function against source-px via ViewportTransform; edits update cells and call recordCorrection with the right kind (add/remove/move/resize); undo/redo (⌘Z / ⌘⇧Z) work with 50-deep stacks; selection set drives bulk delete.
tasks.boundaries: Own only pages/results/editing/. Do not re-implement the engine (kernel-overlay-engine) or the renderer. Keep gesture handlers here; the surrounding layout belongs to feat-results-viewer.

tasks.title: Directory navigation + global keyboard layer
tasks.objective: Implement the frozen keyboard scheme (keymap) and per-page useKeymap hook, including Results next/prev image (←/→), edit-mode keys (V/A/R/M/C/G), zoom keys, and the global shortcuts sheet.
tasks.output: keymap.ts encodes every mapping from KeyboardShortcutsSheet.swift grouped by scope; useKeymap binds active handlers per page; ←/→ advance store.currentImageIdx within the batch; the shortcuts overlay lists them; no double-binding across scopes.
tasks.boundaries: Own the three listed files. Do not put editing logic here (call actions exposed by store / feat-mask-editing). keymap.ts is a kernel file but is delivered by this feature task since no other kernel task needs it first; it must not import page internals.

tasks.title: Batch / folder detection page
tasks.objective: Per-image table for the current batch: filename, status, cell count, mean diameter, size-class mini-distribution, plus aggregate stats and a per-image summary CSV export trigger.
tasks.output: Table rows reflect done/queued/running/error status and counts; aggregates (total cells, mean±σ cells/image, mean±σ diameter) computed from saved detections; size-class mini-dist uses binIndex; ⌘E hands off to feat-export.
tasks.boundaries: Own only pages/batch/. Do not run detection (Home dispatches). Do not implement the CSV writer body (feat-export owns formats); call its command.

tasks.title: Compare view (Mann-Whitney)
tasks.objective: Condition chips (select 1–4), pooled per-condition histograms sharing one Y-axis, size-class breakdown, and a Mann-Whitney U + effect-size panel shown only when exactly two conditions are selected; comparison CSV export.
tasks.output: Pools cells per condition via batchesMatching; histograms use a shared max for comparability; MannWhitneyPanel renders u/p/effect from mannWhitneyU when 2 selected; CSV columns condition,bin_label,count,percent,total_cells,batches.
tasks.boundaries: Own only pages/compare/. Do not modify kernel-stats. Do not implement other export formats here beyond the comparison CSV (or delegate to feat-export).

tasks.title: Models tab (cyto3 install via uv)
tasks.objective: Model catalog UI with cyto3 active in v1 (others shown 'coming soon'); trigger uv-based install with streamed progress; reflect availability; activate the model.
tasks.output: Install button calls env_install and streams progress lines; availability from env_availability/detection_availability gates the Run flow; activating sets store.activeModelId; coming-soon models are non-activatable.
tasks.boundaries: Own only pages/models/. Do not implement the uv bootstrap (kernel-env). Do not add non-cyto3 model runtimes in v1.

tasks.title: Images Library + SHA-256 duplicate detection
tasks.objective: Grid of all imported images with thumbnails; surface duplicate groups (same fileHash); open in Results / delete; select-all.
tasks.output: allImages + duplicateGroups render; delete/open actions work; ⌘A select-all, Return open, Delete remove (confirm); dedup groups computed from whole-file SHA-256 stored at import.
tasks.boundaries: Own only pages/library/. Hashing happens in the Rust importer (kernel-persistence); do not re-hash here. Do not implement export.

tasks.title: Review queue (low-confidence triage)
tasks.objective: Card-stack triage of cells with confidence < 0.65 and no existing correction: Reject/Keep/Edit-diameter/Skip, writing corrections and advancing.
tasks.output: Queue built from uncorrectedCellCount/cells below 0.65 with no correction; R/K/E/→ actions record correction kinds (remove/accept/resize) and advance; badge count matches store.reviewQueueCount; Esc returns Home.
tasks.boundaries: Own only pages/review/. The 0.65 cutoff is canonical and independent of the confidence slider. Do not alter the store's slice shape.

tasks.title: Onboarding + calibration modals + manual diameter
tasks.objective: First-run onboarding flow and the calibration sheet (direct value / draw-on-scale-bar / preset tabs), plus the manual-diameter fallback used when EXIF calibration is absent.
tasks.output: Onboarding gates on first launch; calibration sheet writes store.pxPerUm and can save/list presets via PersistencePort; draw-on-scale-bar derives px/µm from a drawn segment; manual diameter sets the detection diameter prior when no EXIF; objectiveLabel shown.
tasks.boundaries: Own only pages/onboarding/. The EXIF auto-apply happens in the importer; this page handles manual/preset override + first-run only.

tasks.title: _seg.npy import/export (Cellpose GUI round-trip)
tasks.objective: Round-trip masks with the Cellpose GUI: import a Cellpose _seg.npy into the current image's detection (masks→cells/contours) and export the current cells as a _seg.npy, via a small Python helper invoked from Rust.
tasks.output: Command seg_npy_import(imagePath, npyPath) -> DetectionResultDTO and seg_npy_export(imagePath, cells, outPath); the Python helper reads/writes Cellpose's _seg.npy label map + outlines losslessly; Results exposes import/export actions; edits keep the label map consistent (feeds the future train seam).
tasks.boundaries: Own only the three listed paths. Reuse cellpose/numpy from the same uv venv. Do not implement training. Keep the export lossless so corrected masks can later train a model.

tasks.title: Export: PDF report, CSV (cells/summary/annotations), ImageJ ROI, provenance
tasks.objective: Implement all export formats: annotated PNG, cells.csv, per-image summary.csv, annotations.csv, provenance.json, the PDF report, and the ImageJ RoiSet.zip (via the existing _export_imagej_roi.py), matching the Swift column orders and layout.
tasks.output: cells.csv header id,cx_px,cy_px,diameter_um,diameter_px,bin_label,confidence,area_um2,perimeter_um,circularity,eccentricity,mean_intensity,integrated_density,image_filename,centroid_um_x,centroid_um_y,aspect_ratio,solidity,size_class,edge_touching,likely_clump,likely_debris,is_manual; summary.csv header image,n_cells,mean_diameter,sd_diameter,n_small,n_intermediate,n_large,pct_clumps,pct_debris,pct_edge,confluency,n_colonies,mean_colony_size,largest_colony,focus_score,illumination_residual,model_used,ran_at; RoiSet.zip via _export_imagej_roi.py (polygon when contour≥3 else oval, names cell_00001…); provenance.json (pretty, sorted); PDF with header/annotated image/count+histogram+bin table/colonies/QC/F1/provenance footer.
tasks.boundaries: Own only the listed export files + ExportPanel. Pages call these commands; do not embed export logic inside pages. Reuse _export_imagej_roi.py as-is from desktop/python.

tasks.title: Settings (analysis params, presets, reset)
tasks.objective: Settings screen for all analysis parameters (thresholds, confidence, channels, background subtract + rolling-ball radius, watershed + min-distance, GPU toggle, max-parallel), calibration/bin presets management, and destructive reset/wipe.
tasks.output: Editing any param updates the store (persisted to localStorage) and takes effect on the next detection; presets CRUD via PersistencePort; wipeAllUserData clears batches/images/detections while preserving config; matches AppState defaults.
tasks.boundaries: Own only pages/settings/. Do not change kernel-store slice shapes (only consume setters). Do not implement the uv reinstall (Models).
